{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Abidan symbols
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Archlords might be able to endure looking at [[Abidan symbols]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
